titleStmt.title: SII 37.385: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 385. (A.R. No. B 32 of 1941-42.) Pōrumāmiḷḷa, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Pillar in the Veraṇḍah in front of the Lakshmīkāntasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Māgha, śu. 7, Monday, corresponding to 1545 A.D., January 19.

Damaged. It seems to record a sarvamānya gift of the taxes, such as the durgadaṇāyani-varttana etc., and the tolls (Kāṇikē, Kaṭnam etc.) realized in the agrahāra village Koṁkupāḍu by Nandēla Timmayadēva-Mahārāju to Narasiṁha Pegaḍa Gōvindaya of the Bhāradvāja-gōtra and Āpastambha-sūtra.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh, Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 171.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhyudaya
varṣaṁbulu 1466 Agu
krōdhi saṁvatsara māgha śudha 7 sōmavāraṁ puṇyakāla
maṁdu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa vīrasadāśivadēva mahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu
vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhivi sāmrājyamu sē
yucuṁḍagānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Ā
trēyasa gōtraṁ sōma vaṁśōdbhavulaina naṁddēla
Avubhaḷayadēva mahārāja pautṛlaina narasiṁga
yadēva mahārājaputṛlaina naṁdēla timmayayya
dēva mahārājulugāru bhāradvājagōtraṁ
Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyulaina
Ahōbalastānaṁ narasiṁhyapregaḍa pōcirājugā
ri pautṛlayina koṁḍayaṁgāri putṛlaina śrī Ahōbi
la narasiṁhya pegaḍa
gōviṁddayagāriki yi
cina sarvamānya dharma śā
sanakramamu yeṭlanna
nu māku sadāsivadēva
mahārāyalugāru
mā nāyaṁkarānakuṁ
pāliṁcina ghaṁḍi
kōṭasīmaku cellē sakali
sīmalōnu mīku pū
rvāna jellē koṁkupā
ḍu Anē nāmadhēyāna Agrahārānanu
pūrvāna ghaṁḍikōṭaku Aci vaccēṭi durga
daṇāyanīvartana bēḍigi mivi modalaina kā
nike kaṭṇālu yevi galiginānu Anini yi tadhā
tidhi rathasaptamī puṇyakālamaṁdu pinākinī
nadī tīramaṁdu pāvana śrī narasiṁhvadēvuni sa
ṁnidhini śrīma narasiṁhva
putra pautrapāraṁpari
yaṁgānu gānu
maṁduṁnu putrapautra pāraṁpariya
namaḥ . śrī narasiṁha
cinavīrābatuḍu ku
māruḍu Ayyapa vrālu
Digital edition of SII 37.385 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
